zh.lifeSummary: 當Blanche de Tingry於1082年出生在法國帕-德-卡拉斯布爾農維爾時，她的父親Gerard de Bournonville53歲，母親Elsberg Seclis53歲。她和Hugues de Tingry seigneur de Tingry至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1145年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯廷格利享年63歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tingry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Kingery  , a surname of Swiss German origin (see   Gingrich  ).

variants.name: Kingery
meanings: Altered form of   Gingrich  , a surname of Swiss German origin. Compare   Kingrey   and   Kingry  .

nameMeanings.name: Blanche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname for a blonde, from blanche, feminine of Old French blanc ‘white’ (of Germanic origin). It came to be associated with the notion of whiteness as indicating purity, and was introduced into England as a given name by the Normans. A pale complexion combined with light hair was long an ideal of beauty in Europe (compare Modern English fair, which at first meant ‘beautiful’ and then, from the 16th century, ‘light in colouring’).

en.lifeSummary: When Blanche de Tingry was born in 1082, in Bournonville, Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Gerard de Bournonville, was 53 and her mother, Elsberg Seclis, was 53. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Hugues de Tingry seigneur de Tingry. She died in 1145, in Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 63.

ko.lifeSummary: Blanche de Tingry(이)가 1082년 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 부른빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerard de Bournonville(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elsberg Seclis(은)는 53세였다. 그녀는 Hugues de Tingry seigneur de Tingry(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1145년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 틴그리에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.
